summary.phase: T9 Force prestige / Imperial Knight cleanup
scope: Sith tree used by Sith Apprentice and Sith Lord
deferredByUserRequest: Sith Alchemy tree and Sith Alchemy create/craft workflows
Force talismans and dark side talismans

implementationPrinciples: Book descriptions remain the canonical rules text; this pass changes runtime metadata/effects to match those descriptions.
Conditional bonuses against target types, ally positioning, line of sight, or temporary activation states were punted to GM/player or future runtime prompts.
The Ability Engine/passive metadata remains the data authority; derived calculators only gained narrow existing-owner support for skill substitution and Imperial Knight armor math.
Talismans, attuned/empowered weapons, and Sith Alchemy were not implemented in this pass by user request.

implementedExistingOwner.name: Force Deception
implementedExistingOwner.reason: Treat Deception as trained and use Use the Force total when higher. Reroll substitution remains Force/skill-roll prompt work.

implementedExistingOwner.name: Force Treatment
implementedExistingOwner.reason: Treat Treat Injury as trained and use Use the Force total when higher. Medkit/medpac exception is table/skill-use note until skill-use prompts support it.

implementedExistingOwner.name: Armor Mastery
implementedExistingOwner.reason: Counts as Armored Defense and Improved Armored Defense while proficiently wearing armor; no separate flat Reflex modifier.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Dark Healing
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Spend Force Point, make ranged attack against target Fortitude, damage/heal resolution.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Dark Scourge
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: +1 attack only against Jedi characters; target identity/class is GM/player adjudicated.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Drain Force
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter reaction after damaging Force-sensitive opponent; force power/force point resource exchange.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Affliction
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Delayed Force damage only after damaging a single opponent with a Force power.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Dark Healing Field
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter multi-target Dark Healing field with Use the Force vs Fortitude.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Improved Dark Healing
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Upgrade to Dark Healing range/failure behavior; should attach to a future Dark Healing action, not actor totals.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Dark Side Adept
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Reroll Use the Force check only when activating a [Dark Side] Force power; keep reroll.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Wicked Strike
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Critical hit with lightsaber plus Force Point spend moves target down condition track.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Dark Side Master
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Reroll [Dark Side] Force power Use the Force check with Force Point option to keep better result.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Power of Hatred
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter swift action grants nearby/visible low-HP allies temporary HP.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Focus Terror
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter swift action affects allies in 12 squares/LOS with condition track movement and penalties.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Incite Rage
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter aura grants allies rage attack bonus and Reflex penalty while conditions remain true.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Desperate Measures
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter swift action lets allies make immediate attacks at penalty.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Channel Anger
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Swift action Force Point rage buff with duration, skill restrictions, and later condition-track penalty.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Crippling Strike
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Critical hit plus Force Point reduces target speed until fully healed.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Channel Aggression
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Free Action Force Point extra damage after hitting flanked/dex-denied target; target state is punted.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Mystical Link
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: DC 30 Use the Force check produces GM-selected benefit; no fixed static bonus.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Cower Enemies
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Persuasion/Intimidate area use; needs skill-use resolver, not attack bonus.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Force Interrogation
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: After damaging creature(s) with Force power, immediate Persuasion/Intimidate against damaged target.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Inquisition
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Attack and damage bonus only against Force-sensitive targets; punt target adjudication.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Oath of Duty
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Ally within 12/LOS hits with lightsaber; temporary HP until next turn.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Praetoria Ishu
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Allows Block/Deflect for adjacent ally attacks; reaction flow needs prompt.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Strength of the Empire
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Next lightsaber attack gains +1 die after ally trigger; Ward/Cover note is separate ally-cover context.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Praetoria Vonil
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: +1 damage die only with single lightsaber two-handed after moving at least 1 square.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Knight's Morale
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Temporary +1 morale to defenses after ally trigger until next turn; not static Reflex.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Armored Augmentation II
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Only when Armored Augmentation I is active; DR is encounter active effect, not permanent Fortitude.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

extraneousAutomationRemoved.name: Armored Augmentation I
extraneousAutomationRemoved.reason: Once-per-encounter Force Point swift action adds armor Reflex bonus to Damage Threshold until encounter end.
extraneousAutomationRemoved.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.name: Cortosis Retaliation
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.reason: After successful Cortosis Gauntlet parry, optional immediate attack of opportunity.
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.name: Cortosis Defense
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.reason: +2 only on opposed Unarmed roll using Cortosis Gauntlet against lightsaber attack.
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.name: Unsettling Presence
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.reason: Force Point aura with Use the Force check versus Will; encounter aura needs active-effect workflow.
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.name: Embrace the Dark Side
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.reason: Reroll Use the Force check when using [Dark Side] Force power; keep reroll.
gmPlayerOrRuntimeManaged.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

needsPersistentChoicePicker.name: Stolen Form
needsPersistentChoicePicker.reason: Choose a Lightsaber Forms talent and gain it for benefit/prerequisites; needs progression picker.
needsPersistentChoicePicker.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

needsPersistentChoicePicker.name: Force Power Adept
needsPersistentChoicePicker.reason: Choose one known Force power; when using it, spend Force Point to roll twice/keep better.
needsPersistentChoicePicker.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

needsHumanReview.name: Equilibrium
needsHumanReview.reason: Compendium text appears merged/duplicated; review exact talent/class-feature source before automation.
needsHumanReview.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

needsHumanReview.name: Embrace Dark Side
needsHumanReview.reason: Sparse source text in compendium; review alongside Embrace the Dark Side/dark-side reroll rules.
needsHumanReview.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

needsHumanReview.name: Indomitable class feature
needsHumanReview.reason: Mind-affecting allow/deny behavior is class feature / GM adjudication, not actor static bonus.
needsHumanReview.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

needsHumanReview.name: Fortified Body
needsHumanReview.reason: Disease/poison/radiation immunity should be condition-resolver metadata when such resolver exists.
needsHumanReview.recommendedAction: No static automation; build runtime prompt only when appropriate.

codeChanges.reason: Force Deception and Force Treatment are safe derived skill substitutions: mark the affected skill trained and use Use the Force total when higher.

Imperial Knight Armor Mastery uses the existing armor defense calculation path and counts as Armored Defense + Improved Armored Defense while proficiently armored, rather than adding a flat Reflex modifier.

recommendedNextPatchOrder: Build or curate the talisman/attuned weapon/Sith Alchemy item workflows as a dedicated pass.
Add runtime prompt/action support for Dark Healing and Dark Healing Field.
Add Force-suite reroll prompt support for Dark Side Adept / Dark Side Master / Embrace the Dark Side / Force Power Adept.
Add active encounter buff support for Channel Anger and Armored Augmentation I/II.
Add persistent picker support for Stolen Form and Force Power Adept.
Add GM/player notes for target-specific bonuses such as Dark Scourge and Inquisition.
